{{CargoRelic
|name=Limited-Term Killer Contract
|class_id=20989
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Due to declining ROI, all killers now operate on a "rent-to-slay" model—unlimited respawns revoked, invincibility buffs now require sacrificing your afterlife 401K.
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=16
|tech=15
|ss1=In Domain battles, DMG to Beter +333%<br>Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +3.3%
|ss2=In Domain battles, DMG to Beter +666%<br>Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +6.6%
|ss3=In Domain battles, DMG to Beter +999%<br>Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +9.9%
|ss4=In Domain battles, DMG to Beter +999%<br>Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +9.9%
|ss7=In Domain battles, DMG to Beter +999%<br>Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +9.9%<br> (Awakened)
}}
